name: operator namespace conventions.yaml entries are scoped to the operator org via the rule id prefix
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org && printf 'rules:
  - id: my-org-rule-1
    detector: x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-source-file.sh" --file generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/my-org/conventions.yaml --check id-prefix 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_rules_have_org_prefix=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
